---
title: "Theodor Balan"
pagetitle: "Theodor Balan"
---

```{=html}
<main>
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="hero">
      <div class="avatar">
        <img src="/images/avatar.jpg" alt="avatar">
      </div>
      <div class="hero-text">
        <h1>Theodor Balan, PhD</h1>
        <p class="tagline">Data Scientist  |  Statistician  |  R programmer</p>
        <div class="links-row">
          <a href="mailto:hello@tbalan.com">Email</a>
          <a href="https://github.com/tbalan/">GitHub</a>
          <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/thbalan/">LinkedIn</a>
          <a href="https://medium.com/@thbalan">Medium</a>
          <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=-v5tVyUAAAAJ&hl=en">Scholar</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</main>
```
